commands.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g)].map(m=>m[1]); for (const s of scripts) new Function(s); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED')"

commands.result: 既存の syncPendingChanges / handleInit / loadSchedule のみ。今回の履歴表示で新規個別書き込み通信は追加なし。
